commentary: Thirteen activities this week versus ten last week, which means you are either deeply motivated or deeply unable to sit still, and honestly both are valid. The long run came in at 13.1km on Friday which is basically the same distance as last week's Zoo run but your heart rate dropped eight beats on average, which is exactly the kind of quiet cardio improvement that doesn't announce itself but absolutely should. You stacked doubles on three separate days this week — swim plus weights, run plus weights — which is a lot to ask of a body, and the Balmoral ocean swim on Thursday at 98 bpm suggests you were genuinely cooked by that point and the harbour knew it. The pattern here is someone building real volume and getting fitter in the process, but baby, the recovery windows are getting tight, so maybe let Thursday be a little sad and small on purpose rather than by necessity.
